title: Purge and Evidence Export

sources.reason: Uninstall mode and evidence proposal boundary.

riskAssessment.reason: Purge is destructive and must block without double confirmation and a verifiable export bundle.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized the complete serial remediation plan, including governance changes.

preReviewWarnings: Purge remains blocked until export verification and two explicit confirmations are present.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Unconfirmed purge is blocked and displays deletion list, irreversible impact, and recovery warning.
Evidence export is required and partial export failure blocks purge.
Confirmed purge cannot delete external evidence references, Work Item audit records, or project-owned files.
Successful purge returns purged state with evidence digest and receipt.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: Destructive purge must be independently confirmed, export evidence first, and never erase audit or project-owned facts.
constraints: Purge is blocked by default and requires two explicit confirmations.
Export failure blocks purge and produces a resume condition.
Project-owned files, external evidence references, and Work Item audit records remain protected.
intent.rationale: A separate evidence gate makes irreversible cleanup auditable and recoverable up to the export boundary.

rawUserRequest: 走完当前文档的流程；按计划逐个工单执行完整生命周期，包括 PR、合并、清理分支，直到全部工单完成。用户已授权所需确认范围。

declaredIntent.summary: Implement a double-confirmed purge gate with evidence export and protected audit/project boundaries.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Unconfirmed purge blocks with deletion list and warning.
Protected audit and project-owned paths are excluded.
Two confirmations and verified export produce purged receipt.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized the complete serial remediation plan, including governance policy changes.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
